Document:
# Command Roleplay Standards
## General - Do not draw unrelated pictures or write unrelated things on the tacmap. - Do not give medals to marines sarcastically or as a joke. These are permanent awards on a player's account for doing well as a character and should have effort put into them. - Command level roles should maintain reasonable professionalism in the wider public.
## Key Marine Law Notes
This list is non-exhaustive. It's recommended to have full knowledge of marine law before playing command roles.
- A briefing must be conducted at the start of every operation before deployment. - CIC must direct marines to build defenses to protect the primary landing zone.
